org.arakhne.neteditor.io

Class AbstractNetEditorWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorWriter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NetEditorWriter
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractXMLWriter, GMLWriter, NGRWriter

    public abstract class AbstractNetEditorWriter
extends Object
implements NetEditorWriter
    Abstract implementation of a NetEditorWriter.
    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Progression getProgression()
      Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
      ResourceRepository getResourceRepository()
      Replies the resource repository used by this writer.
      String getWriterVersion()
      Replies the version of the writer.
      boolean isAnchorOutput()
      Replies if this writer is outputing the anchors in addition to the graph structure composed of the nodes and the edges.
      protected static boolean isBoolean(Object v)
      Replies if the given object is a boolean.
      protected static boolean isFloat(Object v)
      Replies if the given object is a number that is a floating-point number.
      protected static boolean isInteger(Object v)
      Replies if the given object is a number that is an integer.
      protected static boolean isString(Object v)
      Replies if the given object is a string.
      void setAnchorOutput(boolean anchorOutput)
      Set if this writer is outputing the anchors in addition to the graph structure composed of the nodes and the edges.
      void setProgression(Progression model)
      Set the task progression model used by this reader.
      void setResourceRepository(ResourceRepository repos)
      Replies the resource repository used by this writer.

      • isAnchorOutput

        public final boolean isAnchorOutput()
        Description copied from interface: NetEditorWriter
        Replies if this writer is outputing the anchors in addition to the graph structure composed of the nodes and the edges.

        isAnchorOutput in interface NetEditorWriter
        Returns:
        true if the anchors are output; false otherwise.

        Parameters:
